text.title: AI Spatial Computing UX Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the ai-spatial-computing methodology end-to-end.

step.name: collect-hardware-constraints
step.action: Extract gaze accuracy, gesture FOV, voice mic array, comfort wear-time.

step.name: set-latency-budget
step.action: Budget per leg: gaze→intent, voice→ASR, multimodal model, render. Sum ≤ comfort threshold.
step.decision-gate: If sum > 250ms perceived end-to-end, redesign or reject the interaction.

step.name: design-fusion-rules
step.action: Define which modality is primary per task; fallback policy when one modality fails or is unsafe.

step.name: review-safety-and-comfort
step.action: Apply motion-sickness, eye-fatigue, bystander-privacy checks. Add seated/standing mode policies.
step.decision-gate: If any safety check fails, BLOCK until mitigation is in spec.
